seller.name: Nanjing Mushad International Trading Co., Ltd.
seller.name_original: 南京慕莎德国际贸易有限公司

825532754040.description:
商品描述

亚马逊，速卖通爆款毛毯

Features:

100% Brand new and high quality.

Micro plush microfiber for comfortable, durable warmth on cold nights.

Super soft micro plush throw blanket can prevent electrostatic.

Easy to clean, machine washable, do not bleach. Inhibit bacterial.

Specification:

Condition:100% brand new

Color: 10 optional colors

 

Notes:

Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures.

Please allow slight dimension difference due to different manual measurement

 

+[掌柜说-宝贝信息]

 

先跟各位买家普及一个常识，克重不是重量，克重是描述产品厚度的一个参数，克重的单位是g/㎡，克重越高，毛毯越厚，毛毯最薄的克重是160gsm，280gsm是中等厚度，350gsm是加厚款的克重

重量（kg）=毛毯长（m）x毛毯宽（m）x克重/1000

70x100cm 重量0.25kg （0.5斤）

127x152cm 重量0.6kg（1.2斤）

150x200cm 重量0.95kg（1.9斤）

180x200cm重量1.15kg（2.3斤）

200x230cm重量1.45kg（2.9斤）

230x260cm重量1.8kg（3.6斤）

70x100cm小毛毯包装是卷起来白色腰封是默认的包装，如果需要蝴蝶结可以联系客户说直接扎蝴蝶结的，如下图所示，

original_product.title: Plum Plush Throw Blanket
original_product.description: Soft, cozy plush blanket in a deep plum color, folded and secured with a simple ribbon.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A plush throw blanket made from high-quality faux fur in a soft cream color, folded neatly and tied with a wide satin ribbon in a matching cream hue. The ribbon has a simple, elegant debossed logo. The blanket is presented on a minimalist wooden surface, suggesting a sophisticated gift.
design_alternatives.short_description: Ultra-soft faux fur throw, elegantly packaged for luxurious gifting.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Elevates a basic blanket into a premium gift item. The faux fur adds perceived value and tactile appeal, while sophisticated satin ribbon packaging enhances the unboxing experience, making it highly appealing for e-commerce gifting and special occasions.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A cozy, soft fleece hooded blanket designed as a cute sleeping fox. The blanket is folded to display the fox's face (with embroidered eyes and nose) on the hood, and two small plush fox ears protrude from the top. The main blanket material is a warm burnt orange, with a cream belly panel. It's rolled and tied with a simple natural twine, presented against a playful, bright background with soft focus elements.
design_alternatives.short_description: Wearable fleece blanket with an adorable animal hood for kids.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Adds a playful, functional element (wearable and hooded) that appeals strongly to children and parents. The character theme makes it highly giftable and visually engaging for e-commerce, offering a clear differentiation from a standard blanket and encouraging imaginative play.

design_alternatives.generated_image_prompt: A chunky, soft throw blanket with a distinct waffle weave texture, made from a cotton-blend yarn in a muted sage green color. The blanket is casually draped over the arm of a modern minimalist sofa, showcasing its texture and natural weight. It's wrapped with a simple, wide recycled paper band featuring a clean, minimalist graphic design and a small plant motif.
design_alternatives.short_description: Stylish cotton-blend throw with a cozy waffle texture, perfect for modern homes.
design_alternatives.design_rationale: Focuses on texture and contemporary aesthetics, appealing to home decor enthusiasts seeking functional yet stylish items. The waffle weave offers a tactile and visual upgrade, making it a chic accent piece that also provides comfort, broadening its market appeal beyond just warmth. The minimalist packaging reinforces its modern, eco-conscious appeal.
